example_prompt: List all Notch Pay payments for the last 30 days, filtered by status completed.

search.description: Search term to filter payments by reference, customer, or other fields.

channels.description: Comma-separated list of channel slugs to filter by, e.g. "cm.mtn,cm.orange".

date_start.description: ISO 8601 start date for filtering payments by creation date.

date_end.description: ISO 8601 end date for filtering payments by creation date.

selected.description: Number of records returned in this page (equivalent to per_page).

gotchas: All query parameters are optional — omitting all of them returns the full paginated list with the API default page size.
date_start and date_end must be ISO 8601 strings. Passing plain dates without a time component (e.g. "2024-01-01") may be rejected or interpreted differently by the API.
The Authorization header uses your public key with no 'Bearer ' prefix.
Iterate through pages using the page param and stop when current_page equals last_page to avoid requesting beyond the last page.
Pagination uses 'totals' (not 'total') and 'selected' (not 'per_page') — using the wrong field name will silently return undefined.
